title: Mosquito Control in Somers, NY
metaDescription: Professional mosquito control services in Somers, Westchester. Protect your family from mosquitoes with expert treatment. Licensed technicians. Call today for $125-$325 service!
intro: Somers, NY residents know that our beautiful wooded properties and proximity to lakes and reservoirs create the perfect breeding ground for mosquitoes. The Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive mosquito control services throughout Somers, from historic Reis Park to the estates near Muscoot Reservoir. Our proven treatments eliminate mosquitoes and protect your outdoor spaces all season long.
whyUs: Our licensed technicians understand Somers' unique landscape and the specific mosquito challenges that come with the area's abundant wetlands and tree coverage. We provide fast, reliable service with eco-friendly treatment options that are safe for your family, pets, and the local environment while delivering exceptional results.
localContext: Whether you're protecting your property near Ivandell Cemetery, enjoying your backyard near Heritage Hills, or maintaining grounds along Route 100, we understand the mosquito pressures facing Somers residents. Our team is familiar with the town's rural estates, wooded neighborhoods, and the abundant water sources that make mosquito control essential for comfortable outdoor living in this historic Westchester community.

faqs.question: How much does mosquito control cost in Somers?
faqs.answer: Our mosquito control services in Somers range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size, level of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer single treatments as well as seasonal programs that provide ongoing protection throughout mosquito season. Contact us for a free inspection and customized quote for your Somers property.

faqs.question: How often should I get mosquito treatments in Somers?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection in Somers, we recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks during mosquito season, which typically runs from April through October. Properties near wooded areas, Muscoot Reservoir, or other water sources may benefit from more frequent treatments. Our seasonal programs ensure consistent coverage when mosquitoes are most active.

faqs.question: Are mosquito control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our trained professionals. Our treatments target mosquitoes specifically and break down quickly in the environment. We also offer organic and eco-friendly treatment options for clients who prefer natural solutions for their Somers properties.

faqs.question: What does your mosquito control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive mosquito service includes a thorough property inspection, treatment of vegetation where mosquitoes rest, elimination of breeding sites, barrier spray application around your yard's perimeter, and follow-up monitoring. We focus on shaded areas, bushes, trees, and standing water sources common to Somers properties to provide maximum mosquito reduction and long-lasting protection.
